name: Raspberry Curd#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the raspberries and strain through a fine mesh to remove seeds.
2. Heat 1 1/2 cups of puree in a non-reactive saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add sugar and butter, stirring until combined.
4. Taste and add lemon juice as desired.
5. Whisk eggs and egg yolks separately just enough to mix them.
6. Gradually stir some hot puree into the whisked eggs and yolks.
7. Return mixture to saucepan and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened (temperature reaches 170°F).
8. Chill before serving.
Makes about 2 cups, filling one 9-inch tart.
